meanings.definition: the act of making something (a product) from raw materials
examples: the synthesis and fabrication of single crystals
an improvement in the manufacture of explosives
manufacturing is vital to Great Britain

meanings.definition: put together out of artificial or natural components or parts; ; ; He manufactured a popular cereal"
make up something artificial or untrue

examples: this gland manufactures a specific substance only

meanings.definition: create or produce in a mechanical way
examples: This novelist has been manufacturing his books following his initial success
